problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient may resolve Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
